programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate
programme.desc: Things start to go missing all over the kingdom, and Ben & Holly realise that ants are stealing their possessions. // Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard has lost all his treasure, prompting Holly & Ben to follow the clues in an effort to track it down.

programme.title: E102 - Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E201 - Granny Zanny / Croc Gets A Job
programme.desc: Crocodile tries to impress Daisy's grandmother when she comes to visit. // Mr. Crocodile realizes he doesn't have an official 'job' and goes in search of the perfect one.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate
programme.desc: Things start to go missing all over the kingdom, and Ben & Holly realise that ants are stealing their possessions. // Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard has lost all his treasure, prompting Holly & Ben to follow the clues in an effort to track it down.

programme.desc: Crocodile tries to impress Daisy's grandmother when she comes to visit. // Mr. Crocodile realizes he doesn't have an official 'job' and goes in search of the perfect one.

programme.title: E243 - School Camp
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are going camping with Madame Gazelle. When it gets dark, they all sing a song around the campfire. When it is time for bed, Peppa and her friends get a little scared and all the children end up sleeping in Madame Gazelle's tent

programme.title: E242 - Granny And Granpa's Attic
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but it's hard to decide what to throw out. Amongst the clutter, Peppa finds an old record player and some funny old records.

programme.title: E411 - Volleybull! / Diferente Es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E403 - Penguin Peril / Fix It Fair
programme.desc: Kai helps some penguins fly with a remote control, but it falls into Baron Bite's evil claws! // Sir Steel and Blip create chaos at the Fix-It-Fair as they try to fix things that aren't broken.

programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E116 - Tadpoles / Cows
programme.desc: Holly takes frogspawn home to look after, but is shocked the following morning to discover it has turned into tadpoles. // The children visit the Big Farm to find out where milk comes from.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E307 - The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sp
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.desc: Two capybaras can't be found after a game of hide-and-seek in the wetlands.

programme.desc: Peppa and George are visiting their big cousin Chloe and her new baby brother, Alexander. Baby Alexander is too little to play games, but Peppa and Chloe have a great idea;

programme.desc: Peppa and her family are driving out to the countryside to go for a walk in the woods. Peppa and George discover trails of footprints left by little birds and ants.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day

programme.desc: A Hong Kong police station used to be a clubhouse of the Japanese at the time of their occupation of the city during World War II. However, at the end of the war, many of the Japanese committed haka-kiri in the clubhouse. In the present time, after thief Sneaky Ming was captured and incarcerated at the station, he was lured into a world of the paranormal by the spirits of those still inhabiting the building. He was tricked into unleashing the fierce General Issei, who resurrects into a vampire and wreaks havoc in the city. As a result, police officers Kam Mark-K and Man-Chill attempt to put a stop to the terror.

programme.title: Cop Of The Town
programme.desc: Bill and Lee are a pair of old hands working with the Action Squad in the Police Department. They both have their shortcomings. Bill likes to bet a bit to lighten up and Lee likes to flirt with pretty girls. But their little tales do not in anyway interfere with their dedication towards their work. Unfortunately for them, a Pl Mak is newly appointed as their squad leader. To make matter worse, the new inspector is female. Bill and Lee have to adjust in a hurry how the new inspector likes to handle cases her way...

programme.desc: It's the quarter-final and the teams make desserts celebrating caramel and a Winter Wonderland-themed frozen lollipop display. Who'll crack under the pressure and be frozen out?

programme.desc: Amanda and Alan take on their first project, designing a Sicilian kitchen. Alan tackles demolition in 36-degree heat, and Amanda learns how to cook the island's signature dish.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Romania - Torn Between Work And Home
programme.desc: In the 1990s, many Romanians left their homeland in search of work. They left behind deserted villages: children were raised by their grandparents, the elderly lived alone, and communities fell apart.

programme.title: When Night Falls In Toronto
programme.desc: 'We're just like New York,' they say of their city, and usually add: 'Only nicer!' Toronto is a melting pot of diverse cultures. Most of its residents have immigrated, at some point.

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E71
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E326
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E5 - Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: E116
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E10 - The Flavour Of The Middle Ages
programme.desc: For Pierre Chatelain, preparing recipes with mediaeval flavour is a sacred quest that brings pure happiness. Using produce that is authentic, local and seasonal he sets out to surprise our palate with unknown flavours that take us back to the world of yesteryear.

programme.title: E26 - Spa, Between History And Modernity
programme.desc: Discover Villa le Vert-Bois, restored by the colorful decorator Luca de la Pagerie, at just 30 years old, chocolatier Tarquin Fontaine, based in Nalinnes, is starting to make a name for himself, Margaux Baert transforms simple sheets of paper into true works of art.

programme.title: E87 - Chalons-En-Champagne (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Chalons-en-Champagne, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she explores the Sewing Machine Museum and cooperage craftsmanship.

programme.desc: For Pierre Chatelain, preparing recipes with mediaeval flavour is a sacred quest that brings pure happiness. Using produce that is authentic, local and seasonal he sets out to surprise our palate with unknown flavours that take us back to the world of yesteryear.

programme.title: E18 - Cantal, On The Shoulder Of A Giant
programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: Neighbor's Nurturing Session 'How To Get Along With Ai?'
programme.desc: The program is for parents raising children from elementary to junior high school ages. Parenting problems are difficult to talk to Mom/Dad friends, but they can be serious problems for those involved. Sharing sympathetic voices and ideas gathered from parenting families across the country, we work together to find solutions.

programme.title: E66
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E8 - Nathalie Lasselin, Diving Guide In France
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: E8 - Eric Francois, Kevin Bonnabel
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: E48 - Here's A Raccoon
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E48 - The Honey Badger
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: E43 - Like White Lightning
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Un Bon Garcon
programme.desc: Max, a talented 16-year-old swimmer, is getting ready to enter the sports studies programme. Between training sessions and outings with his friends, he leads the life of an average teenager. But when the police turn up one day to question his coach, who has been accused of sexual abuse, his regulated life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Piscine Pro
programme.desc: With a degree in history and civilisation, Charles-Olivier is struggling to find a job in his field. He eventually takes a job as a clerk in a swimming pool shop. With his spirits low, he's getting by as best he can.

programme.title: E4 - Day 4
programme.desc: After three days, Real feels that the couples are ready for a more important experience: sleeping in the forest. A pivotal night for the three duos who feel the lack of privacy in their shelter weighs on them.

programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: E106 - Situation: Grim
programme.desc: Sonic learns that Nine is using the New Yoke shard to create his dream world in a barren shatterspace called The Grim. Can Sonic convince Nine to fight with him by the Rebels' side against the Chaos Council back in New Yoke, before it's too late?

programme.title: E1 - The Beginning Of The End
programme.desc: After being promoted to top partner at the firm, Liz is forced to accept Ri'Chard Lane as a new name partner brought on to help manage her staff and client load. Meanwhile, Diane experiences deja vu.

programme.title: E3 - The End Of Football
programme.desc: Ri'Chard and Liz team up to work on a case about racial discrimination between a Black coach and an NFL team owner; Ben-Baruch returns and stirs up friction with Carmen.

programme.title: E4 - The End Of Eli Gold
programme.desc: Eli Gold's trial is underway, with Marissa Gold as part of his legal team. Liz and Ri'chard attempt to solidify their working relationships leading to a surprise discovery about Ri'chard's history and Liz's father.

programme.title: E5 - What's Hiding In The Dark

programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E1 - Super Sight
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.desc: Mahadev is a man of principles, leading a strict household as the family head! But bound to fly high, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues!

programme.title: E80
programme.desc: Honest tech visionary Shivaay loses faith in technology after being scammed. When he falls for digital influencer Aadhya, their opposing worlds collide, testing love, trust, and beliefs.

programme.title: E111
programme.desc: Once an AIPMT topper, Aarambhi's life is now weighed down by marital duties, but deep within her lies a long-lost dream. Will she get a second chance?

programme.title: E476
programme.desc: A woman feels deep remorse as haunting memories return, yet she finds the strength to stand firm. Later, a surprising comparison reveals familiar habits that reopen old wounds.

programme.title: E225
programme.desc: A man reveals his revenge plan against a woman, while she seeks permission to attend a college party. Later, an awkward incident ruins her outfit and sparks tension.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E3 - A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a sick trick, a spider, a bump & a fly! First, Jeff is sick, but after he recovers, he misses the attention & pretends he's still unwell! Then, Fuse is woken up by spooky noises in the night & must put on a brave face for Lulu to investigate. His bravery is tested again when he finds a spider in his gym & doesn't know how to get it out. The chaos ends when Pogo can't sleep & has to deal with a very noisy fly!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: Two mothers, Emma and Olive, share love for sickly child Mookie. Birth mother Olive cares for her health, while maid Emma becomes her close friend - until Olive intervenes in their growing bond.

programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E6 - Drew and Cindy With Tom
programme.desc: Friends and bandmates Cindy and Drew look for a Yukon property with mountain views, rehearsal space and a workshop.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 3x World Surf Champion turned wildlife conservationist Mick Fanning teams up with leading experts in new documentary SAVE THIS SHARK. Mick Fanning is on a new mission to explore shark conservation. The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

Lonely Eighteen
programme.desc: This is a story about how family can impact the growth of a young woman. It follows Elaine, who grew up in poverty in the 1980's, and her best friend Ying as they enter the Hong Kong entertainment industry to change their fate. In the golden era of Hong Kong cinema, Ying becomes a popular erotic star while Elaine struggles between her identity and her job as an actor. When Hong Kong cinema's glory fades a decade later, the two women end up on diverging paths due to their life choices.

programme.title: Men of Plastic
programme.desc: The most glamorous part of Seoul, Apgujeong thrives with new possibilities. Dae-guk who is a native of Apgujeong and rules its ground, is eager to start his own groundbreaking plastic surgery business. Then he encounters Ji-woo, the most talented surgeon in the area who lost his medical license due to someone sabotaging his reputation. Dae-guk effortlessly comes up with an idea to make this business happen, and he does everything he can to make Ji-woo his partner. Together, Dae-guk and Ji-woo open a whole new era of Apgujeong.

programme.title: Back Home
programme.desc: Heung Wing has been sensitive to paranormal activity and keeps seeing ghosts since he was a kid, which is called having “Yin Yang” eyes. To avoid being excluded by his peer, he was taught to pretend nothing happened, even though he knew their existence. He then left from Hong Kong to Canada because of his miserable childhood. One day, Heung Wing is told that his mother has been in coma by committing suicide, which forces him to return to Hong Kong. When he goes back to the old home, everything looks strange and unfamiliar to him. What's more horrifying is, a series of weird cases happen in the neighbourhood, and ghosts show up in front of him again. The situation is deteriorating beyond his imagination...

programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。
